What We Do

Full-Service
Door Solutions

From emergency repairs on a Sunday to full commercial fitouts — Doorbotics handles every job with speed, honesty and expert craftsmanship.

🏠

Residential

New installations, motor automation and same-day repairs for homes across Adelaide. Roller doors, panel doors and custom timber slat designs.

🏢

Commercial

Heavy-duty industrial roller doors for warehouses, retail and commercial fit-outs. Built to last, installed with zero downtime to your business.

🔧

Repairs & Service

Fast response to broken springs, stuck doors and motor failures. Available 24/7 including weekends and public holidays — no extra call-out fees.

⚡

Motor & Automation

Upgrade to smart automation with remote access, phone app control and battery backup systems. Smooth, quiet and reliable every time.

🏭

Industrial

Large-span industrial doors for factories, warehouses and distribution centres. Rated for high-cycle use and built to withstand South Australian conditions.

🎨

Custom & Prestige

Timber slat, architectural and designer doors to complement luxury homes and premium developments. Supply and installation included.

Our Work

Recent
Installations

From luxury residential to large-scale commercial — every job finished to the same high standard.

Why Doorbotics

Adelaide's Most
Trusted Door Team

  • ✓

    Available 24/7 — Including Weekends

    Roller door broken on a Saturday? Easter Monday? We answer every call. Emergency response across greater Adelaide.

  • ✓

    Licensed & Fully Insured

    BLD 347707. Fully insured for residential and commercial work. You're protected on every job.

  • ✓

    Transparent, Honest Pricing

    Free quotes, no hidden fees, no Sunday surcharges. The price you're quoted is the price you pay.

  • ✓

    Residential, Commercial & Industrial

    From a single home garage to a full commercial warehouse — we have the equipment and experience for any scale job.

  • ✓

    Keeping You in the Right Track

    Workmanship that lasts. We don't cut corners and we don't leave until the job is right.
